name: sqlbroker
description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code. Cross-platform: Windows Task Scheduler / Linux systemd / macOS launchd. Three auth modes: SQL login (default), Windows Authentication (Trusted_Connection), Azure AD service principal. Passwords encrypted with a per-install master.key (AES-128-CBC + HMAC). Auto-migrates v1 DPAPI and v2.0-2.2 keyring aliases.
